title: OMC Capability Taxonomy
description: Canonical taxonomy of capabilities used by OMC tools, policies, and pipeline phases. Every capability exercised by any tool or agent MUST be declared here and referenced by its capability id.

description.description: Full description of what this capability permits.

risk_level.description: Risk classification. low = read / in-memory only. medium = local writes. high = network or external state. critical = irreversible external changes.

requires_human_approval.description: Whether this capability requires explicit human approval before use.

phase_whitelist.description: Pipeline phases during which this capability is permitted. Omit to allow in all phases.

side_effects.description: List of side effects this capability may produce.

audit_required.description: Whether every use of this capability MUST produce an audit log entry.

x-capabilities-registry.label: File Write
x-capabilities-registry.description: Write files to the local repository workspace. Used in Phase 1 by specialist agents to produce Luau modules and JSON artifacts.

x-capabilities-registry.label: File Read
x-capabilities-registry.description: Read files from the local repository workspace.

x-capabilities-registry.label: RAG Document Retrieval
x-capabilities-registry.description: Retrieve and read sovereign RAG documents (Level Primer, constitution, policies, approved external sources).

x-capabilities-registry.label: Schema Validation
x-capabilities-registry.description: Validate JSON or YAML artifacts against declared JSON Schema definitions.

x-capabilities-registry.label: Escrow Publish
x-capabilities-registry.description: Submit a manifest + module bundle to the Bridge server to create an armed escrow session.

x-capabilities-registry.label: Network Expose
x-capabilities-registry.description: Expose a local HTTP endpoint (Bridge server) accessible to the Studio plugin, optionally via a tunnel such as ngrok.

x-capabilities-registry.label: Client Install
x-capabilities-registry.description: Install ModuleScript instances into the Roblox Studio hierarchy under the declared target_root.

x-capabilities-registry.label: Platform Apply Changes
x-capabilities-registry.description: Apply changes to the live target domain's object tree (e.g. Roblox Studio hierarchy). Always requires explicit user consent via UI action.
